required.fact: Linear is a product-development system for human teams and AI agents.
Its workflow spans intake, planning, building, code review, and monitoring.
Pricing runs from Free through Basic at USD 10, Business at USD 16, and custom Enterprise.
AI and agent capabilities are central to both positioning and higher-tier packaging.
Linear claims more than 33,000 organizations and publishes customer outcome metrics.

important.fact: The product serves startups through enterprises across multiple industries.
Recent releases indicate rapid expansion into code review, context, and agent workflows.

must_not_claim: Linear's customer outcome metrics apply to all customers.
The Enterprise plan has a publicly listed price.
